executive_summary: - Added a PocketBase handler to enable integration with PocketBase collections via MindsDB.
- Implemented authentication using PocketBase credentials and securely stored them.
- Provided detailed documentation for users and contributors.
- Enhanced the integration with MSSQL and PocketBase by adding connection logic and schema handling.
- Improved error handling and added comprehensive tests for reliability.

change_units.title: PocketBase Integration
change_units.description: Adds a PocketBase handler to expose collections as SQL tables in MindsDB.
change_units.inferred_intent: Non-breaking change to add new functionality
change_units.evidence: Commit #1675 - additional test for mysql api

change_units.title: Database Connection Fix
change_units.description: Fixed a bug in the connection logic to ensure proper database registration.
change_units.evidence: Diff shows error handling and connection logic improvements

change_units.title: Environment Variables Support
change_units.description: Added support for environment variables in the configuration.
change_units.evidence: Files changed include addition of environment variables section

change_units.title: Updated Documentation
change_units.description: Updated docs to reflect new features and changes.
change_units.evidence: Files changed include modification of README.md and integration with docs/setup/environment-vars.md

risks_and_concerns: Potential security risk if credentials are exposed in version control.
Risk of connection failures if PocketBase is not properly configured.
Need for thorough testing in different environments to ensure reliability.
